steps.name: Settings screen with area list
steps.criteria: Settings gear icon on HomeView. Tapping opens AreaSettingsScreen showing all configured areas with Add Area button. useAreas hook provides area list from AreaManagement via context.

steps.name: Add area from settings
steps.criteria: Tapping Add Area shows name input. Typing name and saving adds to area list. New area appears in HomeView area sections and MetadataBottomSheet area picker.

steps.name: Rename area from settings
steps.criteria: Each area has edit button. Tapping opens rename input. Saving renames area and propagates to staples/trip items.

steps.name: Delete area from settings
steps.criteria: Each area has delete button. Empty areas deleted with confirmation. Areas with staples show reassignment picker. Last area deletion blocked.

steps.name: AsyncStorage area adapter + app initialization
steps.criteria: createAsyncAreaStorage implements AreaStorage with cached pattern. useAppInitialization creates AreaManagement and provides via context. Loading screen shown during init.

steps.name: HomeView + MetadataBottomSheet use dynamic areas
steps.criteria: HomeView reads areas from useAreas hook instead of DEFAULT_AREAS constant. MetadataBottomSheet area picker shows dynamic areas. Sweep progress uses dynamic count. All existing tests pass.
